case_title: SAFE CREDIT UNION VS. PATRICE J HAMMOND et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAFE CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMMOND, PATRICE J AKA PATRICE HAMMOND $9,629.16 PRINCIPAL, $715.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $340.55 INTEREST, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,059.71, JUDGEMENT FOR POSSESSION OF THE 2001 MERCEDES C240, VIN#WDBRF61J31F073117 (THE VEHICLE)AND JUDGMENT FOR CONTTRACT DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $11,059.71. IN THE EVENT POSSESSION IS OBTAINED THE VEHICLE WILL BE DISPOSED OF IN A COMMERCIALLY REASONABLE MANNER AND THE PROCEEDS WILL BE APPLIED TO THE OUTSTANDING JUDGMENT BALANCE.
